summary: Tested 7 features: 1) Login API, 2) Admin Products page with Import/Add buttons, 3) Product import template download, 4) Product import via CSV/JSON, 5) POS shortcut toolbar (F1, F3, F4, F9, F10, F11), 6) POS price switching (price1 → price2 → box → back to price1), 7) i18n on admin pages. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Fixed overlay (z-40) intercepts pointer events, requires force=True to click through

passed_tests: ✓ POST /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns token
✓ POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
✓ GET /api/products returns list with price1, price2, price3, box_quantity fields
✓ GET /api/products/import/template returns CSV template
✓ POST /api/products/import with CSV file imports products
✓ POST /api/products/import with JSON file imports products
✓ GET /api/stores returns stores list
✓ GET /api/warehouses returns warehouses list
✓ GET /api/customers returns customers list
✓ GET /api/exchange-rates returns exchange rate settings
✓ GET /api/payment-settings returns payment settings
✓ GET /api/dashboard/stats returns dashboard stats
✓ Admin Products page shows 'Import Products' button (data-testid='import-products-btn')
✓ Admin Products page shows 'Add Product' button (data-testid='add-product-btn')
✓ Admin sidebar shows English text when EN language selected (Dashboard, Products, Stores, etc.)
✓ Admin Stores page title 'Stores' in English
✓ Admin Warehouses page title 'Warehouses' in English
✓ Admin Customers page title 'Customers' in English
✓ Admin Transfers page shows 'Transfers', 'New Transfer', 'Inventory Overview', 'Transfer History' in English
✓ POS shortcut toolbar visible at bottom (data-testid='pos-toolbar')
✓ POS toolbar has F1 (搜索/Search) button (data-testid='toolbar-f1')
✓ POS toolbar has F3 (清空/Clear) button (data-testid='toolbar-f3')
✓ POS toolbar has F4 (挂单/Hold) button (data-testid='toolbar-f4')
✓ POS toolbar has F9 (收款/Checkout) button (data-testid='toolbar-f9')
✓ POS toolbar has F10 (取单/Recall) button (data-testid='toolbar-f10')
✓ POS toolbar has F11 (退货退款/Refund) button (data-testid='toolbar-f11')
✓ POS price switching: price1 ($19.50) → price2 ($17.25) works
✓ POS price switching: price2 → box ($198.00/box) works
✓ POS price switching: box mode shows calculation (12×$16.50=$198.00/整箱)
✓ POS price switching: box (qty=1) → price1 converts to qty=12
✓ POS quantity updates correctly when switching from box mode back to piece mode

features_verified.pos_shortcut_toolbar: Working - All 6 buttons visible (F1, F3, F4, F9, F10, F11)
features_verified.pos_price_switching: Working - Correctly switches between price1, price2, and box modes
features_verified.pos_quantity_conversion: Working - Qty converts correctly when switching to/from box mode
features_verified.i18n_admin_sidebar: Working - Shows English text (Dashboard, Products, Stores, etc.)
features_verified.i18n_admin_stores: Working - Page shows 'Stores' title and English labels
features_verified.i18n_admin_warehouses: Working - Page shows 'Warehouses' title and English labels
features_verified.i18n_admin_customers: Working - Page shows 'Customers' title and English labels

critical_code_review_comments: POS page has a z-40 fixed overlay that blocks normal clicks - recommend reviewing the overlay z-index hierarchy
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test import products (TEST_IMPORT001, TEST_JSON001) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: (1) Login with admin/admin123, (2) Admin Products page has 'Import Products' and 'Add Product' buttons, (3) Product import template download works, (4) Product import via CSV/JSON works, (5) POS shortcut toolbar at bottom has all 6 buttons (F1, F3, F4, F9, F10, F11), (6) POS price switching works correctly - tested price1 → price2 → box → back to price1, quantity properly converts when switching modes (1 box = 12 pieces), (7) i18n on admin pages works - sidebar and page content shows English when EN language selected. Product P001 (苹果手机壳) has box_quantity=12, price1=$19.50, price2=$17.25, price3=$16.50.
